---
title: "pennyone-mcp.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/bin/pennyone-mcp.js"
loc: 18
complexity: 2
logic_score: 8.07
style_score: 3.99
intel_score: 3.62
overall_score: 5.34
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [execa](file://execa)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [dirname](file://node:path)

### Exports
- `__dirname`
- `ROOT`
- `bootstrap`
